store_headline: WordPress Theme for Dance and Performing Arts
store_subheadline: Promote shows, publish videos, and manage events for dance companies and performing arts venues.
features: Video-centric design optimized for visual artists and creators
Comprehensive video gallery with custom thumbnail generation
Portfolio showcase system for creative projects and works
Event management for exhibitions, performances, and shows
Playlist manager with audio integration for multimedia artists
Elementor page builder with artist-specific design elements
Dynamic content showcases with Slider Revolution
WooCommerce integration for artwork and merchandise sales
Variation swatches for art prints and product options
Contact forms for commission inquiries and bookings
Professional video presentation with custom thumbnails
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
One-click demo import with complete artist website setups
selling_points: The only WolfThemes theme built specifically for dance companies, performing arts venues, and choreographers
Cinematic dark design with gold/cream accents and dancer-in-motion photography built for the performing arts
Video-forward layout puts performance recordings and show teasers at the center of every page
Event management built for show promotion: list performances, link artists, and drive ticket sales
Gold/cream editorial palette unique across the entire WolfThemes catalog
Elementor-powered for drag-and-drop control over show season pages, company bios, and press kits
WooCommerce integration supports ticket bundles, merchandise, and digital program sales alongside performance content
key_benefits: Promote shows with a cinematic design no generic events theme can match
Publish performance videos as primary content, not afterthoughts
Manage your full performance season: events, show archives, and artist profiles
Attract audiences with a visual identity designed for the performing arts
Sell tickets, merchandise, and program downloads directly through WooCommerce
Build a performing arts presence that signals institutional credibility and grandeur
design_features: Video-centric layout templates for visual storytelling
Professional video gallery displays with custom thumbnails
Multimedia integration for video and audio content
Multiple header styles with artistic aesthetics
Elegant typography optimized for creative content

testimonials.text: Great theme, great custom support - a lot of beautiful UI design components & animations!
testimonials.author: natalikalpakova
